name_en: Top-tier replica N82904/M48865 White Ostrich. This Capucines handbag features a Taurillon leather structure wrapped in ostrich leather for the flap, handles, and LV lettering. The flap can be worn on the outside or tucked inside to read the LV logo. A detachable wide leather shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Size: 21 * 14 * 8 cm
